prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0becf7df`.
codex_response:
Implemented the `0becf7df` ARC2 package. The rule is: the upper-left `2x2` corner is a fixed key, with the top-row colors swapped everywhere else and the bottom-row colors swapped everywhere else. The summary hint was used, because it matched all official examples exactly. No new shared primitive was needed.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0becf7df/verifier.py#L4) and follows the original RE-ARC style with two `switch` calls plus corner restoration. The generator is in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0becf7df/generator.py#L57); it builds sparse `10x10` scenes with a preserved `2x2` key and a connected multicolor cluster grown from transformed seed layouts defined in [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0becf7df/helpers.py#L4). Package exports are wired in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0becf7df/__init__.py#L1).

Validation passed: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 0becf7df` reported `4/4` official examples passed, and `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 0becf7df --n-examples 1000` produced [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0becf7df/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0becf7df/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0becf7df/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0becf7df/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0becf7df/previews/preview_03.png), and 1000 example files in [examples/](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0becf7df/examples). I opened the generated preview sheet and it looks in-family with the official task.
